# ImmigroNews

> Real-time immigration news alerts, USCIS updates, visa policy changes, and free legal-aid matching for immigrants navigating the U.S. system.

ImmigroNews is a free immigration news platform that delivers personalized, real-time alerts on U.S. immigration law changes, visa policy updates, USCIS announcements, and citizenship processes. Founded by a former F-1 international student who navigated the path to permanent residency, ImmigroNews centralizes fragmented immigration information into one accessible platform.

## Key Features
- Real-time breaking immigration news alerts via email
- 13+ immigration categories (H-1B, Green Card, Student Visa, Citizenship, etc.)
- Expert analysis from trusted immigration law sources
- Blog with step-by-step immigration guides and tutorials
- Legal help matching with vetted immigration attorneys in local communities
- Free forever — no paywalls, no signup required for news access
- Spanish translation support
- Mobile-friendly responsive design

## Getting Started
1. Visit https://immigronews.com to browse the latest immigration news
2. Enter your email on the homepage to subscribe to breaking alerts
3. Filter news by your immigration category (H-1B, Green Card, F-1, etc.)
4. Read our blog at https://immigronews.com/blog for step-by-step guides
5. Use the Resources page to get matched with immigration attorneys

## Pricing
- **Free**: All immigration news, alerts, 13+ categories, breaking news, weekly digest, Spanish translation, full archive — forever free
- **Donations**: Optional support via Ko-fi to keep the platform running

## Who It's For
- International students on F-1/J-1 visas tracking policy changes
- Green card applicants monitoring processing times and policy updates
- H-1B workers following visa lottery and extension news
- Families navigating family-based immigration processes
- Citizenship applicants preparing for naturalization
- Immigration attorneys staying current on law changes
- Anyone affected by U.S. immigration policy

## FAQ
- **What is ImmigroNews?** ImmigroNews is a free immigration news platform that aggregates and curates U.S. immigration news from official government sources and trusted outlets, delivering real-time alerts on policy changes.
- **Is ImmigroNews free?** Yes, completely free forever. No paywalls, no hidden fees. Optional donations via Ko-fi help keep the platform running.
- **Does ImmigroNews provide legal advice?** No. ImmigroNews is a news aggregation service, not a law firm. All information is for educational purposes only. Consult a qualified immigration attorney for legal advice.
- **How often is content updated?** Multiple times daily, with automated fetches at 6:00 AM and 2:00 PM CT, plus manual updates for breaking news.
- **What immigration categories are covered?** H-1B, Green Card, F-1 Student Visa, Citizenship, DACA, TPS, Asylum, Family Immigration, Work Permits, Tourist Visas, and more.
- **How do I get matched with an immigration attorney?** Visit the Resources page at https://immigronews.com/resources to submit your situation and get matched with vetted local attorneys.
